'''Navi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:Sephi1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Navi being scolded by his uncle]]
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref><ref name="Heroes on Both Sides">{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}}</ref> as corruption in the Galactic Senate went along, Navi's uncle, [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] noticed that his nephew had become narrow-minded and ignorant. Alaric elected to work against the Republic's corruption and made a decision to join the Confederacy of Independent Systems under the rule of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].<ref name="JediYoda" />

During the [[Battle of Thustra]], Navi and his aide [[Moje]] tricked the Republic into attacking the Sephi forces, making them think that they killed [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]. While attempting to declare to the Republic [[Senate]] that Yoda was killed during the Battle of Thustra, he was interrupted by Yoda himself. As a result, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] ordered he be arrested for crimes against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and conspiracy to commit murder.<ref name="JediYoda" />

{{Char-stub}}
